topic: REM sleep's emotional regulation role — processing trauma
caption: Did you know REM sleep plays a crucial role in emotional regulation? 💤 It's when your brain processes and consolidates memories, including traumatic ones. 🌙 During REM, your brain replays and revises previously experienced events, strengthening the connections between neurons. 🧠 This helps you better cope with stress and trauma. 🌈 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 💕 #REMsleep #emotionalregulation #traumarecovery #mentalhealthmatters #sleepscience #healthrecode #wellnesswednesday #traumahealing
